text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, December 01. No work meetings today. You have FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville and Ethan's soccer practice scheduled.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that we went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is practicing Jingle Bells for the upcoming piano recital. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Busy day for sports! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: The lawn mower is having issues starting. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: I can help troubleshoot that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Relaxation mode active. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Social breaks are great. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. That is a clean implementation. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Sarah found a new recipe to try. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Let's organize the menu. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Screen time is always a negotiation. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sounds exciting! I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Checking on some house maintenance items. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Home maintenance is a constant cycle. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that listening to a podcast in the garage. My starting running back is questionable. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Personal time is valuable. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Social breaks are great. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that researching rover power systems in depth. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. That is a clean implementation. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Planning our weekly meals today. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Healthy choices are great. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Bedtime can be a challenge. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Spent some quality time stargazing with the telescope. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
